content.query:
SELECT 
* 
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION ='2.0'
) AS [RESULT] 
WHERE QUARTER = 'Q1' AND YEAR = 2023;

SELECT country,ROUND(sum(revenue_usd), 2) as Total_Revenue
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION ='2.0'
) AS [RESULT] 
GROUP BY country; 

--- creating view 
CREATE VIEW Apple_revenue  as 
SELECT country,ROUND(sum(revenue_usd), 2) as Total_Revenue
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION ='2.0'
) AS [RESULT] 
GROUP BY country;

SELECT * from Apple_revenue;
